hooks.command: [ -f "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/hooks-disabled" ] && exit 0; if [ -x "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ] || [ -f "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ]; then   node "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" bubble user-prompt codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else   T="$(cat "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/update-token" 2>/dev/null)" [ -n "$T" ] && curl -s -m 0.3 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7777/state -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Petdex-Update-Token: $T" --data-raw '{"state":"jumping","duration":800,"agent_source":"codex"}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi

[ -f "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/hooks-disabled" ] && exit 0; if [ -x "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ] || [ -f "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ]; then   node "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" bubble pre codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else   T="$(cat "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/update-token" 2>/dev/null)" [ -n "$T" ] && curl -s -m 0.3 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7777/state -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Petdex-Update-Token: $T" --data-raw '{"state":"running","agent_source":"codex"}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi

[ -f "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/hooks-disabled" ] && exit 0; if [ -x "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ] || [ -f "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ]; then   node "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" bubble notification codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else   T="$(cat "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/update-token" 2>/dev/null)" [ -n "$T" ] && curl -s -m 0.3 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7777/state -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Petdex-Update-Token: $T" --data-raw '{"state":"waiting","agent_source":"codex"}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi

[ -f "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/hooks-disabled" ] && exit 0; if [ -x "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ] || [ -f "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ]; then   node "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" bubble post codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else   T="$(cat "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/update-token" 2>/dev/null)" [ -n "$T" ] && curl -s -m 0.3 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7777/state -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Petdex-Update-Token: $T" --data-raw '{"state":"idle","agent_source":"codex"}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi

hooks.statusMessage: sovereign: persist key facts before compact

hooks.command: [ -f "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/hooks-disabled" ] && exit 0; if [ -x "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ] || [ -f "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" ]; then   node "$HOME/.petdex/bin/petdex.js" bubble stop codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; else   T="$(cat "$HOME/.petdex/runtime/update-token" 2>/dev/null)" [ -n "$T" ] && curl -s -m 0.3 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7777/state -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Petdex-Update-Token: $T" --data-raw '{"state":"waving","duration":1500,"agent_source":"codex"}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi

hooks.statusMessage: sovereign: final reflect + memory + golden path
